## tscli list devices

List devices

### Synopsis

List every device registered in your tailnet.

By default only the common fields are returned.  
Use --all to include advanced fields such as ClientConnectivity, AdvertisedRoutes, and EnabledRoutes.

Examples

  # Standard view
  tscli list devices

  # Full view (all fields)
  tscli list devices --all


```
tscli list devices [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --all    Include every field returned by the API (equivalent to '?fields=all').
  -h, --help   help for devices
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
  -k, --api-key string   Tailscale API key
  -d, --debug            Dump HTTP requests/responses
  -o, --output string    Output: [json yaml human pretty]
  -n, --tailnet string   Tailscale tailnet (default "-")
```
